page_metadata.biotools__summary: Efficient random sampling in convex polytopes relies on a 'rounding' preprocessing step, in which the polytope is rescaled so that the width is as uniform as possible across different dimensions.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Efficient random sampling in convex polytopes relies on a 'rounding' preprocessing step, in which the polytope is rescaled so that the width is as uniform as possible across different dimensions.
